description: Rubens designed this elaborate oil sketch as part of a tapestry series intended for a convent in Madrid. He created two tiers of celebrants—the heavenly on the upper level and the earthly on the lower level. The series’ patron, Spanish archduchess Isabella Clara Eugenia, is represented in a nun’s habit at the lower left to signify her piety and reinforce her status as an important patron of the arts in the ruling family.
title: The Adoration of the Eucharist
